content.en:
"This black mist area should be the core area of this Void Treasure Land, but it's too dangerous, I'm afraid that only the Origin Upper Realm Overlord is qualified to enter!"

However, the Origin Upper Realm Overlord had no way to enter this Void Treasure Land.

"Let's go to the area full of plants before!"

Subsequently.

Ye Tian came to that plant area, the plants here are very powerful, it is generally a plant called the Manzhu Ghost Tree, the lethality is terrifying, even if the ordinary top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor comes, he will be besieged and killed.

But.

Ye Tian's strength was much stronger than in the past, and he was forced to kill him.

However, he couldn't stay here forever, or he would be besieged and killed.

So, after some time, he escaped and came out with some things.

He found three flowers from it, the sap of a kind of ruin soul reincarnation tree.

"These three flowers have the effect of enhancing the origin of the other side!"

This is the conclusion reached by Ye Tian after testing.

It was still the sap of the Ruin Soul Reincarnation Tree, which had the effect of enhancing the will of the Origin Realm, which helped him a lot.

His current Origin Realm will is a weakness, far less advanced than the Origin Realm on the other side.

So, he began to use the sap of the Ruin Soul Reincarnation Tree to improve the will of the Origin Realm, although he had also obtained some treasures before, which could improve the will of the Origin Realm, but the effect was not as good as the sap of the Ruin Soul Reincarnation Tree.

After a period of time, the sap of these ruin soul reincarnation trees was completely depleted.

He entered that area again, found a Ruin Soul Reincarnation Tree, and tried his best to break the Ruin Soul Reincarnation Tree with the High Treasure Spear on the other side, and took away part of the Ruin Soul Reincarnation Tree sap.

That's it.

Ye Tian had been using this method to collect the sap of the Ruin Soul Reincarnation Tree and use it to enhance his will in the Origin Realm.

Gradually, his Origin Realm will slowly kept up with his cultivation.

this day.

Ye Tian passed through this plant area at the cost of serious injuries, came to the end, and also saw the black mist area.

Obviously, from here, you will still encounter the black fog area.

He didn't know the secrets of the Black Mist area, and he didn't have the strength to explore, so he had to give up.

But.

He still collects as many resources as he can to improve his strength.

And from beginning to end, the Desolate Blood Ancestor didn't know Ye Tian's behavior.

......

Before you know it, another long time has passed.

One after another Origin Ascendant has come here, and many of them have fallen, and this matter has gradually been poked out.

As a result, many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors did not dare to take on the task of the Ancient Heavenly Palace.

After all, they didn't want to lose their lives for the treasure!

this day.

Ye Tian's copy body came out of the Void Treasure Land, this is the copy body with the Desolate Ancient Pearl, in this way, the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace will think that he is out, even if something happens to this treasure land, it will not suspect him.

After Ye Tian came out, he paid half of the resources and left.

Subsequently.

He emerged from the ruins of reincarnation and returned to Stormtooth Island.

After returning, the Lord of the Wind Tooth and the Lord of Ice and Rain inquired, and after learning that nothing happened, they didn't care.

Soon after Ye Tian came back, he announced a retreat, and actually secretly replaced the copy body.

The cultivation of this replicating body, he has not been promoted, for fear of being suspected.

But now, he came out of retreat for a period of time, and his cultivation skyrocketed, and they wouldn't be surprised by the Lord of Wind Fang.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian searched for resources unscrupulously in the Void Treasure Land, and traveled through many places, collecting more and more resources.

It's a pity that he doesn't dare to come out now, otherwise he will be discovered by the Desolate Blood Ancestor.

He didn't dare to approach the other Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, once he sensed it from afar with his copying talent, he would also flee as soon as possible, otherwise he would be exposed if he was sensed by the Desolate Ancient Ancestor.

Fortunately, nothing has gone wrong.

Millions of primeval years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian didn't know how many resources he had refined, and the origin of the other side had already reached the level of 100 million.

At this time, his cultivation had already reached the peak of the Origin Upper Realm, and his physical body was also stronger than many Origin Upper Realm peak powerhouses, and his Origin Realm will had also improved a lot.

It can be said that his current strength has almost reached a level where it is difficult to improve.

Even, if he obtained the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side, he would be qualified to attack the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm.

It's a pity that he doesn't have the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side.

"Now that I don't lack resources, I lack the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And the only chance he had to hope for the Origin Ancestor Body Method on the other side now was to obtain an Origin Ancestor Order.

So, he asked who had the Origin Ancestral Order on him and didn't use it.

After some inquiry, he really inquired.

"Lord of Kunchi!"

This Lord of Kunchi is also a top-notch Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and his strength is very strong, and he has not yet used the Origin Ancestor Order.

The reason why he didn't use it was because he had used an Origin Ancestral Order in the past, but he didn't get the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side, and he wanted to wait until his strength was stronger before using the Origin Ancestral Order on the other side.

In Ye Tian's opinion, there was still hope for obtaining the Origin Ancestral Order from this Lord of Kunchi.

On this day, Ye Tian came to visit the Lord of Kunchi.

The Lord of Kunchi didn't really want to see Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian didn't have much reputation in the middle of the land on the other side of eternity.

But.

After Ye Tian showed his aura, the Lord of Kunchi also politely met Ye Tian.

After all, Ye Tian's aura had already reached the level of the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and it was stronger than him, so such a Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor naturally had to be polite.

"Hello, Lord of Kunchi, I am the Endless Lord of Wind Tooth Island!"

Ye Tian introduced himself.

"Lord of Endless, what are you looking for me?"

The Lord of Kunchi asked.

Ye Tian was not tactful, and directly stated his purpose.

"Lord of Kunchi, I want to trade the Origin Ancestral Order in your hand. Ye Tian said.

"I'm sorry, I won't trade the Origin Ancestral Order!" the Lord of Kunchi refused.

Ye Tian said again: "Lord of Kunchi, don't be busy refusing, I can pay any price, you can say any conditions." The Origin Ancestral Order will only come out in batches for a long time, and it is not impossible to obtain. Moreover, if you can't obtain the Origin Ancestor Body Method on the other side, then the Origin Ancestor Order will be wasted. Wouldn't it be nice to exchange it for the treasures you need?"

The Lord of Kunchi frowned, and then said, "My current Origin Rule on the Other Shore has reached the realm of ninety percent six, if you have a way to come up with resources that can make my Origin Rule on the other side break through to ninety percent seven, I am willing to give you this Origin Ancestral Order." "
